chapter_title.ar: بَابُ دَعَوَاتٍ مُوجَزَاتٍ لِجَمِيعِ الْحَوَائِجِ لِلدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 60 – Brief supplications for the entirety of the needs of the world and the Hereafter

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/465)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/465)

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُ كَانَ

text: يَا مَنْ يَشْكُرُ الْيَسِيرَ وَ يَعْفُو عَنِ الْكَثِيرِ وَ هُوَ الْغَفُورُ الرَّحِيمُ اغْفِرْ لِيَ الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي ذَهَبَتْ لَذَّتُهَا وَ بَقِيَتْ تَبِعَتُهَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Yaqoub Bin Shuayb,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, that he<sup>asws</sup> was saying: ‘O the One Who Thanks for the less, and Forgives from the more, and He<sup>azwj</sup> is the Forgiving, the Merciful. Forgive my sins for me whose pleasure has (already) gone, and there remains its consequence’’.
en.sarwar: 28. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Sinan from Ya’qub ibn Shu’ayb from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “O the One who appreciates the very little and pardons a great deal, who is forgiving and merciful, forgive my sins, the pleasures of which are gone and the consequences have remained.”
